query: SELECT ms.sessionNumber, ms.presence, ms.taskStatus, ms.engagementScore, ms.sessionDate FROM mentoring_sessions ms JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id WHERE a.nome LIKE '%Joseane%' ORDER BY ms.sessionNumber;
